fields.name: Theory of Change
fields.description: Resources related to developing logical pathways that explain how interventions lead to intended outcomes and impact.

fields.name: Logical Framework
fields.description: Resources related to planning, implementing and evaluating projects using logical framework methodology.

fields.name: Performance Indicators
fields.description: Resources related to designing, selecting and measuring indicators for project and organizational performance.

fields.name: Monitoring
fields.description: Resources related to continuous tracking of activities, outputs and programme implementation.

fields.name: Evaluation
fields.description: Resources related to assessing programme effectiveness, relevance, efficiency, sustainability and impact.

fields.name: Impact Assessment
fields.description: Resources related to measuring long-term changes and outcomes resulting from interventions and programmes.

fields.name: Data Quality
fields.description: Resources related to ensuring the accuracy, completeness, consistency, reliability and integrity of data.

fields.name: Results-Based Management
fields.description: Resources related to planning, monitoring and managing programmes with a focus on measurable results and outcomes.

fields.name: Performance Reporting
fields.description: Resources related to communicating programme performance, indicators and results to stakeholders.

fields.name: Learning & Adaptation
fields.description: Resources related to organizational learning, adaptive management and continuous improvement through evidence.
